cannot-change-file-permissions: Could not change permissions to file %file%
configure-tbai-company: If you have already configured Ticketbai, you can sign the invoice by clicking on the sign button or by changing the invoice status to issued. Otherwise configure Ticketbai from your company profile.
configure-tbai-control-panel: If you have already configured Ticketbai, you can sign the invoice by pressing the sign button or changing the status of the invoice to issued. Otherwise, configure Ticketbai from the control panel.
es-tax-exception-141: Spain: Exception for article 141 of the VAT Law
invoice-address-not-filled: Missing data in the invoice address
invoice-annulled-but-not-saved: The invoice has been annulled but could not be saved
missing-ticketbai-company: You must fill in the Ticketbai configuration from the company.
missing-ticketbai-settings: You must fill in ticketbai configuration from the control panel
no-basque-country-company: The company does not belong to the Basque Country
php-gmp-not-installed: GMP extension needs to be installed and active in PHP
required-ticketbai-sign-data: A problem occurred when trying to save the invoice after signing, missing mandatory fields.
send-tickbai-desc: Choose whether or not to send this line when signing the invoice in Ticketbai.
tbai-annular-correct-error: Invoice cancelled successfully but with errors
tbai-annular-delivered-error: Error cancelling the invoice in Ticketbai, the cancellation was sent to Ticketbai but could not be completed
tbai-sign-error: Error when signing the invoice with ticketbai: %error%
ticketbai-annulled-response-file-not-cop: Error copying the annulled response file
ticketbai-annulled-sent-file-not-copy: Error copying the annulled sent file
ticketbai-annulled-sent-file-not-decompr: Error decompressing the annulled sent file
ticketbai-anullar-response-not-ok: Error cancelling the invoice in Ticketbai: %status%
ticketbai-bizkaia-line-without-iae: Cannot leave lines without IAE in Bizkaia.
ticketbai-bizkaia-natural-person-iae-lim: Natural persons issuing invoices in Bizkaia cannot exceed the limit of %limit% headings.
ticketbai-bizkaia-natural-person-without: Natural persons issuing invoices in Bizkaia must specify their IAE in company settings.
ticketbai-company-invalid-cifnif: The CIF/NIF %cifnif% of the company is not valid
ticketbai-delete-before: It is not possible to delete an invoice that has already been signed with ticketbai
ticketbai-iae-exists-in-invoices: Cannot delete an IAE that has already been used in an invoice.
ticketbai-invoice-invalid-cifnif: The CIF/NIF %cifnif% of the invoice is not valid
ticketbai-invoice-send-but-not-saved: The invoice has been sent to Ticketbai but the response could not be saved
ticketbai-invoice-total-0-without-discou: Can't sign an invoice whose total is 0 without a 100% discount
ticketbai-invoice-without-lines-or-send-: Cannot sign an invoice without lines or without sending the lines to Ticketbai.
ticketbai-its-already-signed: The invoice is already signed with Ticketbai
ticketbai-json-not-generated: Failed to generate JSON to send to Ticketbai
ticketbai-line-without-description-and-p: You cannot leave lines without a description and with a price different from 0.
ticketbai-line-without-tbai-send-null: You cannot leave lines without sending to Ticketbai and with the null field, save the invoice for correction.
ticketbai-previous-not-generated: The previous invoice has not yet been marked as issued
ticketbai-response-not-correct: Invoice submitted to Ticketbai but with errors.
ticketbai-response-not-delivered: Error sending the invoice; it could not be submitted to Ticketbai.
ticketbai-simplified-without-cifnif: Customer of the invoice must have a VAT number
ticketbai-xml-not-exists: The signed XML for Ticketbai was not found
ticketbai-xml-sign-not-found: The signed XML by Ticketbai was not found
